playbook.intent: Raw idea in a notebook → paid landing page + working MVP with first 5 paying users.
playbook.scope: Solo founder takes one raw idea from notebook to a launched MVP, exit-criteria is a written go/no-go decision backed by problem evidence, scoped spec, shipped product, and at least 5 paying customers (or a clean kill).

success-criteria.criterion: Written JTBD statement for the chosen idea
Paid landing page live with checkout
5 paying customers OR documented go/no-go kill decision
Decision doc with evidence trail (interviews, metrics, learnings)

stage.name: Discovery
stage.intent: From multiple raw ideas to one chosen problem with documented JTBD.

tasks.task: Generate idea variants and pick top 1-3 by founder-market fit
Define the Job-To-Be-Done and the painful workflow it replaces
Survey 10 prospects for problem severity and frequency

stage.decision-gate: Advance if ≥7/10 interviews confirm the pain is top-3 in their workflow. Pivot to a different idea variant if 4-6 confirm. Kill if ≤3.

stage.name: Validate
stage.intent: Confirm willingness-to-pay before any code is written.

tasks.task: Define value proposition tied to the JTBD
Run 5 follow-up interviews focused on pricing signal
Identify minimum viable pricing tier

stage.decision-gate: Advance if ≥3/5 prospects say "yes, I would pay $X today" with a specific number. Pivot pricing/scope if vague. Kill if pricing softens on every call.

stage.name: Spec
stage.intent: Smallest possible build scope with explicit cuts.

tasks.task: Write 1-page spec covering only the validated workflow
Cut anything not on the critical path to first payment
Define acceptance criteria per feature

stage.decision-gate: Advance if spec fits on one page AND all features map to acceptance criteria. Iterate spec if either fails.

stage.name: Build
stage.intent: Working MVP that delivers the validated value, nothing more.

tasks.task: Implement only spec items in order of dependency
Skip features that don't block first-payment flow
Deploy to a real URL daily, however ugly

outputs.output: Working URL with the validated workflow end-to-end
Implementation log (what shipped, what was cut)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when a stranger can complete the validated workflow without help. Stay in Build if anyone needs hand-holding.

stage.name: Beta
stage.intent: 5 friendly users run the MVP under real conditions.

tasks.task: Invite 5 prospects from Discovery interviews
Observe usage; do not pre-explain features
Log every confusion point

stage.decision-gate: Advance if ≥3/5 reach the value moment unaided. Iterate UX if 1-2. Re-spec if 0.

stage.name: Launch
stage.intent: Paid landing page live; first paying users converted.

tasks.task: Build paid landing with checkout
Convert beta users to paying customers
Open public sign-up

stage.decision-gate: Advance if ≥5 paying customers in 14 days post-launch. Else Decide stage.

stage.name: Decide

tasks.task: Compile evidence trail: interviews + metrics + paying-user feedback
Write explicit decision: continue / pivot / kill
If continue: define next 30-day milestone

outputs.output: Decision doc with evidence and next-30-days plan (or kill rationale)

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written decision. No 'maybe'. No 'see how it goes'.

extra.value: ['Team scaling, hiring, or fund-raising — out of scope', Multi-product portfolio strategy — single-idea playbook, Enterprise-grade security/compliance — covered in pro/geek playbooks]
['Founder has at least one candidate idea (any form: notebook, voice memo, tweet)', Access to a credit card for landing page tooling (~$30 total stack)]

[Building before Validate stage — easy to confirmation-bias your way into code, Cutting Decide stage when the MVP feels 'almost there' — that's exactly when it matters, Treating Discovery interviews as sales calls — kills signal]

['Can I show a stranger the decision doc and they understand WHY we shipped/killed?', 'Did I actually cut something during Spec, or did I just rename items?', 'Did the 5 paying users find me, or did I beg friends?']

{human: faion get-content solo-idea-to-validated-mvp --format md, agent: faion get-content solo-idea-to-validated-mvp --format context, json: faion get-content solo-idea-to-validated-mvp --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-17, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, P1 unit, global-flow angle'}]
